title: Update guarantees page
description:
Please update the contents for their guarantees page.
https://reimerhvac.com/guarantees/

Here are the contents to use: 
Our Guarantees

Peace of Mind

• All our technicians are background checked, drug tested, and receive ongoing training for your peace of mind and expert service. 
Installation Date

• If we do not have your system or generator installed and operating by the date promised, we will pay you $500 for your inconvenience. 
Protection 

• During our visit to your home, your property will be well protected. In the unlikely event that any of your belongings are damaged, we will ensure they are repaired or replaced to your satisfaction. 
No Frustration 

• If your hot water tank or tankless system breaks down during the first year and leave you without hot water, we will be there in 24 hours, or we will pay you $500 for your inconvenience. 
Comfort 

• We ensure that the HVAC systems we install in your home will heat or cool as promised. If the temperature range we guaranteed is not met, we will repair or replace the system at no cost to you. 
Money Back

• After investing in one of our recommended home comfort systems, if you are not 100% satisfied within the first year, we will do everything in our power to make things right, or refund you 100% of your money. 
No Surprise

• At Reimer, we believe in transparent pricing. The quote you receive upfront is exactly what you'll pay, no hidden fees or unexpected charged. You can have peace of mind knowing that any additional work will only proceed with your written approval. 
• Please note that permit fees are not included in the initial estimate and will be billed separately, as determined by local municipalities. 
No Lemon 

• If the compressor, the core of a new air conditioning system, fails twice within the first five years if installation, we will replace your air conditioner and provide you with a brand new warranty at no charge. 
• If the heat exchanger in a new furnace fails within the first ten years, we will replace your furnace and offer a new warranty at no additional cost. 
• If a generator engine fails twice in the first five years, we will install a complete and new generator. 
• If the transfer switch failed twice in the first three years, we will install a new transfer switch. 
• If the tank liner or heat exchanger, the heart of your new water heating system, fails twice within the first five years after installation and the system has been properly maintained, we will replace the entire unit at no cost and provide you with a brand new warranty.

Thanks much!

title: Organic Search Decline Month on Month
description:
Hey I noticed a decline in organic search traffic on this site and did a bit of digging. Here are the findings.

Decline in Organic Clicks and Impressions:
On GSC, I saw a decline in both clicks and impressions month-to-date, and noticed that most of the affected pages were brand-related, so the homepage and location pages were the main culprits:



Here are the main pages that saw a decline in clicks:

Branded Search Decline:
A branded search decline normally means the site is affected by a manual action or penalty, and paid campaigns have been restructured, or there are competitors bidding on their brand. It looks like it is related to paid campaigns, as they have Google Ads running.

When doing spot checks for branded searches using the same keywords that have declined within their location, the first clickable result is not the brand most of the time. Here are some of the results:

Paid Location pack Result:



On mobile, we have what looks like directories that are appearing before the brand as well:


Conclusion:
The decline is definitely not an SEO related issue, but it is something we can flag with the client. We could possibly request having their Google Ads account linked to GA4, so we can have a look at some campaigns and we can monitor performance results that harm overall SEO performance. This is not to blame their paid search partners, but to ensure that the overall performance of the site is prioritized.

I would recommend sending this info to the client. Looping in for final approval as we may need a few more spot checks before confirming that indeed there's brand bidding or paid campaign issues at play.
